name: Pinch and Rotate

outputs.name: Stay
outputs.description: Executes the next node when 2 fingers touch and pinch the screen

outputs.name: Relative Scale
outputs.description: The scale multiplier change from the beginning frame of the pinch to the current frame

outputs.name: Relative Angle
outputs.description: The angle change in radian from the beginning frame of the rotation to the current frame

description: Tracks the scale multiplier changes when two fingers touch the screen and move inward and outward
